name: MarketingOS
current_focus: 6 BuilderOS decision gaps closed (R2 storage, autosave, user identity, English-only, download-first export, team accounts Phase 2). 5 Adam decisions still open in §12. Phase 0 revenue starts today. Phase 1 code starts after §12 OPEN decisions resolved.
next_task: 1. Create Stripe payment links ($250 + $997 from Amendment 27). 2. Set up Cloudflare R2 bucket + 6 Railway env vars. 3. Resolve §12 OPEN decisions (pricing lead, first vertical, Amendment 23 relationship). 4. Write db/migrations/[date]_marketing_schema.sql.

required_routes.description: Send message to AI coach, receive response
Run extraction pass on completed transcript
Get all generated pieces with approval status
Approve, reject, or regenerate a content piece
Download content pack as formatted text

storage_decision.reason: Lower egress risk, simpler cost control for audio/video assets, better fit for future media-heavy workflows
storage_decision.alternative: AWS S3 — future optional, not Phase 1

assertions.label: at least one AI provider key configured
OpenAI API key for Whisper transcription

phase_0_revenue.offer_1: $250 Speed Fix via Amendment 27 Stripe link
phase_0_revenue.offer_2: $997 Build My Thing via Amendment 27 Stripe link
phase_0_revenue.delivery: Manual — Zoom session, AI council, email delivery
phase_0_revenue.blocker: Stripe payment links not yet created

adam_decisions_pending: Amendment 23 relationship: keep as sibling or absorb?
First vertical: real estate agents, wellness coaches, or SaaS founders?
Team/multi-user in Phase 1 or defer to Phase 2?
Phase 5 publisher: Buffer API or Publer API?
completion_checks: Consent record created before every session (no exception)
Session coaching conversation returns warm, encouraging AI responses
Extractions return ≥3 items of varied types from real transcript
Content pieces generated per platform with brand voice
Approval workflow changes piece status correctly
Data wall script passes — no LifeOS imports in marketing services
All Phase 1 acceptance tests in verify-marketing-phase1.mjs pass
anti_drift_notes: MarketingOS is the parent platform; SocialMediaOS is the first customer-facing module. Creator Media OS is a sibling module — do not duplicate its scope (avatar video, likeness capture). No video generation before Phase 3 readiness gate. No publishing before approval workflow is live. LifeOS data wall is constitutional — no exceptions.
builderos_execution_contract: No MarketingOS code before manifest is valid
No video generation before Phase 3 gate passes
No publishing endpoints before approval workflow is verified
No LifeOS table access from any marketing service
Every route must have a verification script entry
Every migration must be reversible or additive-only
Every phase requires proof receipts before next phase begins
Reuse word-keeper-transcriber.js — do not reimplement transcription
